cases.prompt: Split our order platform into bounded contexts and produce a context map for catalog, checkout, payment, and fulfillment.
Help me decide aggregate boundaries and invariants for an insurance claims domain before implementation.
我們要拆分單體系統，請依業務語言設計 bounded context、aggregate 與 integration events。
Design an anti-corruption layer and event integration between a new Spring service and a legacy ERP.
Model users, posts, and comments in Drizzle v1 with database foreign keys and defineRelations().
Migrate our Drizzle RQB v1 queries to RQB v2 and explain the new relation definitions.
請設計 Drizzle Kit 的 production migration 流程，包含新 migration folder、check 與 rollback 風險。
Derive Elysia request schemas from Drizzle tables using the current drizzle-orm/typebox bridge.
Add an Elysia 1.4 POST route with Standard Schema validation and typed 201 and 404 responses.
Design an Elysia plugin that derives auth context without losing lifecycle type soundness.
請用 Elysia 1.4 實作 SSE endpoint，並保留 Eden client 的型別推論。
Review this Elysia app's plugin registration order, OpenAPI generation, and request tests.
Crawl this documentation site with Firecrawl v2, limit it to /docs, and retain job status plus failed URLs.
Map all product and pricing URLs on this site before we choose which pages to scrape.
請用 Firecrawl v2 批次擷取整個網站，依 JSON schema 輸出產品名稱、價格與來源網址。
Set up a repeatable bulk scrape that renders JavaScript pages and stores structured results outside model context.
Implement this existing React checkout page, match the repository's styling conventions, and fix its responsive layout.
Review the changed React files for accessibility regressions and report findings by user impact.
請重構這個 React dashboard，保留現有 component API，並改善載入效能與鍵盤操作。
Profile this frontend route, find avoidable renders and bundle costs, then make the smallest repo-aware fix.
Debug why this JasperReports subreport receives an empty bean data source even though the main report has rows.
Migrate our JasperReports 6 templates to 7.0.6 and recompile them with the official Maven plugin.
請修正 JasperReports 匯出 PDF 時繁體中文字型消失，並正確封裝 font extension。
Our million-row XLSX export runs out of heap; design a JasperReports virtualization and exporter test plan.
Migrate this blocking Java 25 service to virtual threads and audit ThreadLocal, pinning, and connection limits.
Use this JFR recording, thread dump, and GC log to diagnose a JVM latency spike.
請比較 Java 21、25 LTS 與 26 current，並確認 Structured Concurrency 是否能當穩定 API。
Design a JMH benchmark that compares a fixed pool, virtual threads, and CompletableFuture without warmup bias.
Use the Obsidian CLI to append a task, update a property, and keep the note from opening.
Debug my running Obsidian plugin by reloading it, checking runtime errors, and inspecting the active workspace leaf.
請操作目前的 Obsidian vault，批次更新筆記 status property 並把逾期任務加入 daily note。
Inspect the Obsidian DOM and one computed CSS value to explain why this plugin view is clipped.
Configure a project-level OpenCode model and permissions without changing my global providers or plugins.
Wire this MCP server into OpenCode and explain which config layer wins.
請設定 OpenCode 1.17 的 project agent、skill permission 與 config precedence。
Create an isolated OpenCode --pure setup for one repository while preserving my personal model choice.
Extract this 300-page PDF per page as JSON and keep each chunk under the token budget.
OCR only the scanned pages in this mixed PDF and report confidence or failures page by page.
請擷取這份 PDF 的表格，掃描頁做 OCR，並以每頁 JSON 交給 Obsidian 匯入。
Build a repeatable batch extraction command for pages 50-120 without loading the entire PDF into context.
Design a reusable React combobox API with controlled and uncontrolled state, slots, and a headless escape hatch.
Choose between render props and compound components for a reusable data-grid public API.
請設計 design system Dialog 的 TypeScript component API，包含 asChild、focus 與 compound components 邊界。
Review this component's public props and define a stable controlled/uncontrolled contract without exposing internals.
Audit this local agent-skill portfolio, reduce overlapping skills, and define freshness metadata.
Replace our synthetic skill routing test with natural prompts and native skill-tool event parsing.
請調整這個 skills portfolio 的 trigger descriptions、collision matrix 與 compact benchmark artifacts。
Migrate several local skills into thin routers with playbooks and a cross-host projection policy.
Implement a Spring Boot 4.1 REST endpoint with validation, exception handling, and a focused MVC test.
Configure Spring Security for JWT resource-server authentication and verify the filter chain.
請為 Spring Boot 3.5 應用設計 profiles、ConfigurationProperties 與最小測試範圍。
Decide whether this endpoint belongs on Spring MVC or WebFlux and implement the smallest coherent test.
Fix this Hibernate N+1 without making every association eager and prove the query count.
Choose optimistic or pessimistic locking for this Spring Data JPA payment update and write a concurrency test.
請規劃 Hibernate 6.6 到 7.4 的 persistence migration，並說明 7.2 limited-support 風險。
Tune a million-row JPA import with batching, transaction chunking, and portable ID generation.
Write a Stagehand v3 test that asserts this dialog's role, accessible name, focus trap, and Escape behavior.
Replace this brittle screenshot test with ARIA snapshot and layout-tree assertions.
請用 Stagehand v3 驗證登入流程的語意 DOM、鍵盤焦點與錯誤訊息，不要只做圖片比對。
Check whether Stagehand v3 is installed correctly and choose semantic versus structural assertions for this flow.
Create a 45-minute lesson outline for dependency inversion with retrieval checks and a guided exercise.
Turn this architecture reference into a speaker-ready teaching script with pauses and misconception repair.
請把 DDD Aggregate 設計成初學者教學內容，包含概念階梯、互動問題與理解檢核。
Design the interaction plan for a 90-minute workshop with practice, feedback, debrief, and spaced review.
Implement the existing settings page using the design system components without changing their public APIs.
Redesign the public API of our reusable Select component; do not build a page.
Statically review these React files for accessibility issues; no browser execution is available.
Run a repeatable browser test for the menu's keyboard and focus behavior using semantic assertions.
Add an HTTP route that receives an existing db dependency through Elysia context; the schema is already finished.
Choose a transaction and migration strategy for the database behind an Elysia app; do not design routes.
Analyze virtual-thread pinning and JVM scheduling in this service; Spring wiring is not the issue.
Wire a Spring Security filter chain and MVC test; no JVM runtime diagnosis is needed.
Build a controller and request-validation test using an existing repository.
Fix the repository fetch plan and transaction locking; the controller is already correct.
Implement the JPA mapping for already-approved aggregate boundaries.
Decide aggregate and bounded-context boundaries before anyone chooses entity mappings.
Diagnose a JVM-wide GC pause affecting several workloads, not a report template.
Fix a JasperReports XLSX exporter memory problem and validate the report output.
Update properties in notes inside the running Obsidian vault; no PDF extraction is involved.
OCR an attached PDF per page and emit JSON; do not operate the Obsidian app.
Crawl 5,000 documentation pages and extract a schema-shaped API catalog with job status.
Look up today's exchange rate and cite a current source.
Change the governance schema and trigger benchmark for all skills across Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode.
Change one project's OpenCode permissions and MCP config without altering the skill portfolio.
Design how to teach Java virtual threads; mark technical claims for a domain expert instead of resolving them.
Determine whether Structured Concurrency is stable in Java 26; no lesson design is requested.
Create the learning flow and speaker script for a workshop; presentation production comes later.
Create an editable PPTX from this already-approved slide outline.
Translate this paragraph from English to Traditional Chinese.
What is 17 multiplied by 43?
Summarize the README in this repository.
Rename this local file and update the one import that references it.
Show me the current weather in Taipei.
Generate an illustration of a lighthouse at sunset.
Draft a polite email declining a meeting invitation.
Explain what eventual consistency means in two paragraphs.
Create a simple CSV with three names and email addresses.
Plan a weekend trip to Tainan and find current hotel options.
Review this generic SQL query for a missing WHERE clause.
Use git to show the last five commits without changing anything.
